---
title: "Paper: Predicting recall by reading skill"
editor: visual
---

These are analyses for the paper "Predicting recall by reading skill" ...

```{r}
#| message: false

library(dplyr)

# read data
mydata <- read.csv("mydata.csv")
```

# Methods

## Create Scales

-   Item 2 was reverse coded, so we have to recode (answer options from 1 to 6) first.

-   We create scales by means

```{r}
# recode
mydata$item2_r <- 7 - mydata$item2

# create scale
mydata <- mydata |>
  mutate(recall = rowMeans(data.frame(item1, item2_r)))
```

# Hypothesis 1

> The higher the reading skill, the higher the score in the recall test.

```{r}
fit <- lm(recall ~ reading_skill, data = mydata)
summary(fit)
```
